description: A system operator needs an accurate 24-hour load forecast for the entire grid to plan for generation dispatch.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve historical load data and the latest weather forecast (temperature, humidity, cloud cover).

expected_outcome.value: System gathers all necessary input data.

nodes.task_description: Generate an hourly load forecast for the next 24 hours using a machine learning model.

expected_outcome.value: System produces the load forecast with confidence intervals.

nodes.task_description: Visualize the forecast on a dashboard for the system operators.
